backend/main.mo: Main ICP actor implementing a luxury cosmetics store backend with persistent product management, site settings (including colorScheme), Shopify product import, and role-based access control via MixinAuthorization.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module that upgrades the actor state from OldActor (without colorScheme) to NewActor by adding a default 'default' colorScheme field to siteSettingsPersistent.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping three color scheme features (TypeScript type update, admin UI color picker, and site-wide CSS variable application) to their relevant files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Auto-generated JSON summaries of all frontend source files, describing each component, hook, page, and utility at a high level for build planning reference.
frontend/index.css: Base Tailwind CSS file defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark themes used by shadcn-ui components.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point titled 'Glow Shop — Luxury Cosmetics' with Google Fonts preconnect links and a root div mounting the React app.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React app component that sets up TanStack Router with all page routes and includes a ColorSchemeApplier component that reads colorScheme from site settings and applies it as a data attribute on the document root.
frontend/src/components/CartItem.tsx: Cart line item component displaying product image, name, category, unit price, quantity selector, line total, and a remove button with optimistic updates and toast notifications.
frontend/src/components/DeleteProductDia: A confirmation alert dialog for deleting a product, using the `useDeleteProduct` mutation hook and displaying success/error toasts on completion.
frontend/src/components/FeaturedProducts: Displays a grid of up to 8 featured products fetched via `useGetFeaturedProducts`, with loading skeletons, error/empty states, and a link to the full shop.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Site footer with brand info, quick navigation links, brand promises, copyright year, and a caffeine.ai attribution link.
frontend/src/components/HeroBanner.tsx: Full-width hero section with a background image (with fallback), gradient overlay, headline copy, and a 'Shop Now' call-to-action button linking to the shop page.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Root layout component that wraps all pages with a sticky Navigation header, a main content area via `<Outlet />`, and a Footer.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Sticky top navigation bar with logo, desktop and mobile nav links, an active-route indicator, and a cart icon showing the current item count.
frontend/src/components/ProductCard.tsx: Product card component displaying image, category, name, price, and an add-to-cart button, with out-of-stock handling, image fallback, and toast notifications.
frontend/src/components/ProductFilters.t: Sidebar filter panel for the shop page, providing category pill buttons and a price range slider with a clear-all option when filters are active.
frontend/src/components/ProductFormDialo: A modal dialog component for adding or editing a product, with form validation and fields for name, category, description, price, image URL, stock, and featured status.
frontend/src/components/ProductTable.tsx: Renders a table of products with image, category, price, stock, and featured columns, and provides edit/delete actions via dialog modals.
frontend/src/components/PromoBanner.tsx: A horizontally scrolling marquee banner displaying promotional messages over a background image with a rose overlay.
frontend/src/components/QuantitySelector: A numeric quantity input component with increment/decrement buttons, enforcing configurable min/max bounds.
frontend/src/components/ShopifyImportPan: A panel that fetches and displays Shopify products via the Storefront API and allows importing individual products into the local catalog.
frontend/src/components/SiteSettingsSect: A settings form for configuring store name, contact info, hero banner image, currency, Shopify integration credentials, and color scheme, with live preview and save functionality.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A React hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous backend actor using Internet Identity, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication, wrapping DFINITY's AuthClient to expose login, logout, and identity state with status tracking.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines TanStack Query hooks for fetching and mutating products, cart, orders, and site settings via the ICP backend actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet importing Google Fonts and defining Tailwind base styles, CSS custom properties for light/dark themes, and multiple named color schemes (e.g., rose-petal).
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers.
frontend/src/pages/AdminPage.tsx: Admin dashboard page with tabbed sections for managing products (add/refresh/table), site settings, and Shopify import, showing product stats in a header bar.
frontend/src/pages/CartPage.tsx: Shopping cart page that displays cart items with quantities and a subtotal summary, handling loading skeletons and an empty-cart state with a link to the shop.
frontend/src/pages/CheckoutPage.tsx: Renders the checkout page showing cart items, subtotal, shipping, and total, and handles order placement by calling the placeOrder and clearCart mutations before navigating to the confirmation page.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Composes the home page from HeroBanner, PromoBanner, FeaturedProducts, a features section, and a CTA section linking to the shop.
frontend/src/pages/OrderConfirmationPage: Displays a post-purchase confirmation screen, reading the order ID from sessionStorage and showing next-steps messaging with links to continue shopping or return home.
frontend/src/pages/ProductDetailPage.tsx: Shows a single product's image, price, stock status, and description fetched by ID, and allows the user to select a quantity and add the item to the cart.
frontend/src/pages/ShopPage.tsx: Renders the full product catalog with category and price-range filters via a sidebar, displaying filtered results in a responsive product grid.
frontend/src/types.ts: Defines shared TypeScript interfaces for the store's core data models: Product, CartItem, ShoppingCart, Order, and SiteSettings.
frontend/src/utils/imageHelpers.ts: Provides helper functions that return static asset paths for the hero banner, promo banner, product placeholder, and a product image with fallback to the placeholder.
frontend/src/utils/session.ts: Manages a persistent anonymous session ID stored in localStorage, generating a UUID v4 on first access.
frontend/src/utils/shopifyApi.ts: Fetches products from a Shopify store via the Storefront GraphQL API, returning typed ShopifyProduct objects including pricing and image data.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting, persisting, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage fallback support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom fonts, OKLCH-based color tokens (including brand colors like ivory, blush, gold), border radii, shadows, and animation keyframes for the cosmetics storefront.
project_state.json: Project state manifest (version 13) tracking existing features, requirements, and architectural notes for a cosmetics e-commerce site with homepage, catalog, cart, checkout, and admin pages.
